title: JICKLUS Modded Ores
description: An simple add-on that makes some modded ores fit with the JICKLUS style!
body:
An very simple, yet effective, add-on for the JICKLUS texture pack! 

It changes the vanilla stone texture from five mods (Better End, Better Nether, Create, Bewitchment and Mythic Metals) to the JICKLUS stone texture, so the landscape has an more natural feeling!
